name: Pathway To Promise
description: Pathway to Promise intervenes in the lives of Virginia teenagers who’ve become entwined within the juvenile criminal justice system. name: Scott Thomas Gilchrist, LCSW
description: I am an LCSW, and I have been working for over 30 years with Adults, children and families who have issues with trauma, anxiety, anger management, couples counseling, addictions, ADHD treatment and assessments and issues related to breaking up families. I am a certified Anger Management Specialist, I'm trained in neurofeedback and EMDR. I am a Certified Clinical ADHD, Anxiety and Trauma Treatment Provider through PESI. I have worked with children, men, women, and couples, trying to strengthen themselves and their families. In all cases, I help and try to achieve their maximum potential through helping the mind, body and spirit.I am a certified anger management specialist through NAMA, I have been trained in neurofeedback and EMDR. I am a Certified Clinical ADHD, Anxiety and Trauma Treatment Provider. I have years helping people work through trauma. I use cognitive behavioral therapy, mindfulness practices, Solution Focus, couples counseling, for individuals, couples and groups.I love helping individuals, families and groups to find the maximum potential of which they can achieve.
address: 17201 Jefferson Davis Highway Colonial Heights, VA 23834

name: Southside Orthodontics
description: At Southside Orthodontics, our philosophy is simple. Do things the right way, the first time. We know that everyone expects their orthodontic care to be of the highest quality, but it isn’t easy to know whether it actually is or not. At Southside Orthodontics, we deliver the highest quality orthodontic care possible.  That means that we don’t skip steps or avoid certain treatments because they are more challenging. Instead, we promise to give you the exact care and attention required to bring about your healthiest smile.  Doing the right thing also applies to how we treat our patients. We genuinely care about every person who walks through our door, and our patients can feel it. You can’t fake genuine care, not over the span of a relationship. Our patients know that we have their best interest in mind and care for their well-being in all areas of life, not just in their smiles.

description: The practice of Thomas G. Schleicher, DDS PLC proudly provides comprehensive dentistry in Colonial Heights, Virginia, and the surrounding areas. Our skilled dentist and team are committed to providing personalized, high-quality care to patients of all ages, and we utilize advanced dental technology to ensure that your visit to our friendly office is comfortable and free of stress or anxiety. With a variety of services ranging from preventive care to restorative dentistry, and from general treatment to cosmetic dentistry, we are here to meet all of your dental needs. We invite you to contact us today to learn more about our dental treatment options and to schedule your appointment with our experienced dentist, Dr. Tom G. Schleicher. We look forward to caring for your smile!

At U.S. Care Behavioral Health, our personalized counseling and other services help you achieve and maintain stability, reach your goals, and lead a fulfilling and productive life. Our services are designed to address each client’s unique needs and provide the right tools to leverage existing strengths and abilities in order to achieve success in life. To learn more about what we do or to request behavioral health services, get in touch with us today.
